settings.title: Settings Hub
settings.subtitle: AI contextual reference
settings.deleteWorkPrompt: Are you sure you want to delete the project '{name}' and all its settings? This cannot be undone.
settings.deleteWorkAlert: At least one project must remain.
settings.deleteNodePrompt: Are you sure you want to delete '{name}'? If it's a folder, all its contents will be deleted.
settings.clearAllTitle: Clear all setting entries in the current work
settings.clearAllPrompt: Are you sure you want to clear all {count} setting entries in '{name}'? Folder structure will be preserved, but all content will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.
settings.importNoWork: No work node found in file
settings.importOverwrite: A work named '{name}' already exists. Overwrite?
settings.importEmpty: Could not parse any settings entries from the file

settingsEditor.emptyDesc: Click the button below to add your first setting item.
settingsEditor.selectDesc: Select an item from the tree navigation on the left to view and edit its details.
settingsEditor.rulesDescriptionPlaceholder: Describe this writing rule; AI will strictly follow it…

aiSidebar.title: ✦ AI Assistant
aiSidebar.summarizeTitle: Summarize checked chat history into a digest
aiSidebar.editSummary: Edit Summary (replaces checked history upon confirmation)
aiSidebar.inputPlaceholder: Type message... (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for newline)
aiSidebar.emptyArchiveHint: AI generated content will be archived here automatically
aiSidebar.emptyContextHint2: Please add items in settings first
aiSidebar.statsNoDataHint: Statistics will be recorded automatically after sending messages or using AI features
aiSidebar.statsRatesHint: Calculated over total wall-clock time since first request, reflecting consumption intensity under continuous use
aiSidebar.statsProjectionsHint: Extrapolated linearly from historical daily average, based only on actual usage volume
aiSidebar.statsClearConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear all token usage statistics? This cannot be undone.
aiSidebar.statsModelBreakdownHint: Usage breakdown by API provider and model

sidebar.inputPlaceholder: Type your message... (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line)
sidebar.alertRetainOne: At least one chapter must remain
sidebar.importWorkConfirm: Importing will replace all current chapters. Detected {count} chapters, {words} words total. Confirm import?
sidebar.importWorkNoChapter: No chapters detected. Please check the file format.
sidebar.importWorkSelectDesc: Detected {count} chapters, {words} words total. Choose which work to import into:
sidebar.importWorkReplaceConfirm: Import chapters into "{name}"? This will replace all existing chapters in that work.
sidebar.conflictDesc: The following chapters share the same number. Select which ones to keep:
sidebar.previewEmpty: This chapter has no content yet

page.noChapterHint: Select or create a chapter to start writing

snapshot.title: 🕒 Time Machine (Version Snapshots)
snapshot.subtitle: Automatically save and manage your project's version history
snapshot.restoreWarning: After restoring, all unsaved changes to the current project will be overwritten. A snapshot will be created automatically before overwriting just in case.
snapshot.selectHint: Select a version on the left to view details
snapshot.promptLabel: Enter a description for this snapshot (e.g.: Backup before major revision):
snapshot.confirmRestore: Warning: This will overwrite all chapters and settings with the state from "{label}" ({date}). Current state will be backed up automatically. Confirm rollback?
snapshot.restoreSuccess: Rollback successful! The page will reload to load the previous state.
snapshot.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this snapshot? This cannot be undone.

tour.step1Content: Click the "＋ New" button in the left sidebar to create a new chapter. All content is saved locally in your browser in real time.
tour.step2Content: This is your main writing area. Supports Markdown syntax and auto-rendering, providing a paginated paper-like experience. Press Ctrl+J at the cursor to invoke inline AI assistance!
tour.step3Content: Click here to open the AI sidebar, where you can discuss plot with AI or have it help refine your settings and provide writing suggestions.
tour.step4Content:
This is the brain of your workspace. Make sure to configure your AI model API Key here, otherwise the AI assistant won't work. You can also change language, theme, and build your world settings.

⚠️ Privacy Notice: When using AI features, your API Key and text content are relayed through the deployer's server. If you're using someone else's instance, destroy your API key at your provider's site after trying it out. For serious use, fork and deploy your own instance.
tour.step5Content: If you skipped the tour or want to review it again, click the 📖 Help button. In the top-right corner of the help panel, you can restart the tour anytime.
tour.step6Content: Author is an open-source project! Click this GitHub icon to visit our repository. Star ⭐, file issues, and contribute!
tour.introHint: For a better writing experience, would you like a 1-minute tour of the core features?

apiConfig.intro:
🔑 Configure your AI service provider. Your API Key is stored locally, but when using AI features, it is relayed through the deployer's server to the AI provider.

⚠️ If you're using someone else's deployed instance: use it only for a quick trial. Destroy your API key at your provider's site afterward. For serious use, fork and deploy your own private instance.
apiConfig.geminiNativeHint: 🔷 Calls the Gemini API directly in native format, supporting all native features. Authentication uses a URL parameter (?key=), different from the OpenAI format.
apiConfig.embedDesc: When enabled, you can configure a dedicated text embedding model separately from the chat model (the core technology for solving long-text memory issues).
apiConfig.embedApiKeyPlaceholder: Leave blank if using the same key as the chat API
apiConfig.howToGetKey: 💡 How to get an API Key?
apiConfig.keyGuide:
• ZhipuAI: Visit open.bigmodel.cn to register and create a key
• DeepSeek: Visit platform.deepseek.com
• Google Gemini: Visit aistudio.google.com/apikey for a free key
• SiliconFlow: Visit siliconflow.cn (credits for new users)
• Moonshot: Visit platform.moonshot.cn
apiConfig.fetchEmbedModelsFailed: Failed to fetch embedding model list
apiConfig.advancedParamsDesc: When enabled, customize temperature, sampling, and output limits. When disabled, defaults are used. Editor and chat share the same parameters.
apiConfig.temperatureDesc: Higher = more random, lower = more deterministic. Recommended 0.7–1.2
apiConfig.topPDesc: Controls sampling range, 1.0 = no filtering. Recommended 0.9–1.0
apiConfig.maxContextLengthDesc: Maximum context tokens sent to the model
apiConfig.reasoningEffortDesc: Controls reasoning depth, only affects models that support reasoning
apiConfig.balanceNotSupported: Balance check not supported for this provider
apiConfig.toolGoogleSearchDesc: Let AI search the internet for latest information; search sources will be included in the response
apiConfig.toolCodeExecutionDesc: Let AI write and run code to solve math computations and more; code and results will be shown in the response
apiConfig.toolWebSearchDesc: Let AI search the internet for latest information (requires a search-enabled model, e.g. gpt-4o-search-preview)
apiConfig.enableSearchDesc: Let AI search the internet for latest information; sources will be shown in the response
apiConfig.searchBuiltinHint: Uses the provider's native search feature, no extra configuration needed
apiConfig.searchBuiltinCustomHint: Uses the provider's native search (proxy must support forwarding tools parameter)
apiConfig.exaHint: Pay-per-use, free credits on signup → exa.ai

preferences.intro: You can change your language and visual theme preferences here at any time. All changes take effect immediately and are saved locally.
preferences.themeWarmDesc: Eye-friendly retro paper texture, focused immersion
preferences.themeModernDesc: Minimal white-cool grey with premium frosted glass experience

bookInfo.intro: 💡 This information helps AI understand your work's direction and style. Even filling in just one or two fields will significantly improve AI quality.
bookInfo.title: Title
bookInfo.titlePlaceholder: E.g.: The Daily Life of a Cultivator
bookInfo.genrePlaceholder: E.g.: Xianxia / Urban / Mystery / Romance / Sci-Fi / Fantasy / Historical...
bookInfo.synopsisPlaceholder: Summarize the core of the story in a few sentences
bookInfo.stylePlaceholder: E.g.: Light-hearted, serious, poetic, hard-boiled, light novel style...
bookInfo.tonePlaceholder: E.g.: Warm and healing, dark and oppressive, intense and passionate...
bookInfo.povPlaceholder: E.g.: First person (protagonist's POV), limited third person, omniscient...
bookInfo.targetAudiencePlaceholder: E.g.: Male web novel readers aged 18-30, female romance readers...

update.updateSuccess: ✅ Update complete, please refresh or restart
update.noUpdateAvailable: ✅ You are on the latest version
update.checkFailed: ❌ Failed to check for updates, please try again later
